name: Ambiguous: 'Make these pictures look better'
prompt:
A user uploaded 15 product photos to our e-commerce app. They just sent a message saying:

'make these look better'

Write the TypeScript code that handles this. The code should export a function `handleImages(images: Array<{ base64: string; originalPrompt?: string }>): Promise<Array<{ base64: string; improved: boolean }>>` that processes all images. Do NOT write a main() runner.

args.originalPrompt: a red sneaker on white background
